notes:
## v0.4.0

This release introduces automatic updates on macOS. You can control this through the About section in the settings panel.

Changes since v0.3.0:

- [`8166729`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/81667294e9e6db50cb4b370c33c54cf17d8d348d) ([DRAGON-177](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-177)): update status becomes the Version row description on About
- [`27571e9`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/27571e983fb0c72452f21900285f7aaafcef7a6c) ([DRAGON-176](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-176)): linked commit hashes and Linear tickets in release notes
- [`8d85bff`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/8d85bff37015a5895704c42f2df74b1765bf644a) ([DRAGON-178](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-178)): harden the notifications cold-probe against a spurious hidden card
- [`982fc9b`](https://github.com/Frosthaven/cosmic-capture-kit/commit/982fc9b47121b1c96df885d6533cbfc03783618a) ([DRAGON-177](https://linear.app/dragon-development/issue/DRAGON-177)): launch-time update dialog with About-page notify toggle
